tiktok.label: TikTok
tiktok.role: Your growth engine — where new people find the farm
tiktok.plain: We haven't been able to pull a live number for 6 weeks — TikTok keeps blocking the counter. Last we saw: about 11,900. Top recent video got 146 likes.

instagram.label: Instagram
instagram.role: Your storefront — where guests check you out before booking
instagram.plain: 76 followers, 109 posts, 5.9% engagement — everything is exactly the same as last week. Nothing has moved because nothing has been posted.

facebook.label: Facebook
facebook.role: Your local board — older, nearer, ready to book
facebook.plain: Facebook hides these numbers unless you're logged in as the page. The public page shows 12 likes and a bio that still says “moving to TN.”

health.plain: It's been 24 days since your last Instagram post (June 19 — the piglets). The account has gone quiet for 3+ weeks.

headline: Two things are colliding this week: your feeds have gone quiet for 24 days, right as farm stays became a mainstream 2026 travel trend. The single best moment to sell overnight stays is here — and nothing is posting.

actions.title: Post to Instagram today
actions.why: It's been 24 days. Put up one animal clip right now — accounts grow when they post, and yours has been silent for three weeks. Then keep something going every few days.

actions.title: Jump on the farm-stay trend
actions.why: Farm stays are officially a big 2026 travel trend this week — Expedia, Booking.com and ABC News all said so. Post a “wake up on the farm” video and tell people they can come visit.

actions.title: Build your booking path
actions.why: Add a Story Highlights row on Instagram (you have none), put one booking link in all three bios pointing at the $50 Alpaca Walk, and make a simple waitlist form for the glamping tents.

actions.title: Get TikTok counting again
actions.why: We've been unable to read your TikTok follower count for six weeks straight. Hook up a counter so your biggest audience is actually being tracked.

actions.title: Freshen up Facebook
actions.why: The bio still says “moving to TN.” Update it, add a booking link, and start sharing posts into local Tennessee travel & RV groups.

signals.title: Farm stays & glamping
signals.text: Just went mainstream for 2026 — Expedia, Booking.com, ABC News and more all named farm stays a top trend this week. Best moment yet to push overnight stays.

signals.title: RV rentals (To The Max)
signals.text: Holding at about $214 a night across the 2026 guides — a solid, reliable price to rent your Class C at. No change this week.

signals.title: ModReady (mod tool)
signals.text: Someone on Reddit asked about the ModReady pack this week and the download page just updated — good sign people are looking for it.

trendNote: The story in one line: your follower count is flat and the account has gone quiet. Growth stalls when posting stalls — that's the pattern to break.
